title: Video by fit_4_football
description:
⚽️WHY IS MOANING GOOD ON THE PITCH⚽️

There is no good reason for moaning on the football pitch so EVERYONE needs to stop! Moaning is negative energy and there is no place for it! Moaning on the pitch is a distraction! The best players just move on and don’t live in the past on the pitch! ⚽️

Learn to do this as a footballer! If something doesn’t go your way don’t moan about it just focus on getting the next thing right! ⚽️

#footballfitness #soccerdrills #footballacademy #footballelite #socceracademy
